notes.text: Site visit measurements. Main building 24x27, 8/12 pitch, 2 stories. Lower porch 13x10, 8/12 pitch, 1 story (also being re-roofed - the current shingles need replacement). Additional small sun-porch already metal-roofed and excluded from scope. Hipped roof structure: 110 LF hips total, 10 LF ridge, 0 valleys (porch tied off separately). 1 small chimney. 17 windows. ~20 ft wall flashing main + ~10-12 ft on porch return = 30 LF walls. Gutters wrap main + lower porch (~148 LF perimeter). 44.3 km from Moncton (Day Trip pricing band).
notes.author: system

notes.text: Sales context: Michele asked for metal. Mac wants to surface Performance Shell + Eve Protection as configurable upgrades. Customer can mix-and-match in a fully dynamic configurator (built May 7).
notes.author: system

notes.text: ENVELOPE CONFIGURATOR seeded. Asphalt: Gold/Platinum/Diamond. Metal: Standard/Enhanced/Premium. Siding: skip / Standard Vinyl / Sequoia Premium / WoodShade Cedar Shake (designer). Trim toggles: gutters/soffit/fascia. Bundle scoring: Performance Shell (1.47x) / Plus (1.52x) / Plus Ultra (1.58x) per SOP v2. Eve Protection modifier when 1-3 trim items selected. Cash discount tiers at $50K (3%) / $75K (5%) / $100K (7%). Standalone mob premium $1,200, standalone multiplier 1.52x. Hard costs: best-estimate market median for Atlantic NB on 1,632 sqft walls + 9.35 SQ roof. REFINE WITH MAC before sending live.
notes.author: system
